chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1709 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.7745/2024 2. For hearing of main case 23.01.2025 Qazi Umair Ali, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Mukesh Kumar Khatri, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General The petition impugns notice dated 18.03.2024. Per learned counsel for the petitioner, the adjudicating officer ought to have considered the issue of limitation at the very onset and decide the same keeping in mind the judgment dated 26.10.2020, passed in CP D 6008 of 2017 by this court, however, despite instances of remand the same has not been done. Counsel states that the petitioner would be satisfied if notice would be adjudicated by the concerned authority and a speaking order be passed inter alia specifically addressing the issue of limitation. It is further added that it would be just and proper if proceedings also provide an opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and that no coercive action be taken against the petitioner pending such adjudication. Counsel for the department has no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of as aforesaid. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
